case_title: KAN, MI YU AN IND. vs. SIU, PAUL C. AN IND. et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAN, MI YU AN IND. AS TO DEFENDANT SIU, PAUL C. AN IND. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
